name: Biscuit & Sausage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place biscuits on a floured surface in 3 rows of 3 each.
2. Use extra biscuits as needed while patting and rolling until seams are joined to form a square of pastry.
3. Crumble sausage in a medium skillet; add onion and cook until sausage is no longer pink. Drain and spread evenly over biscuit dough.
4. Mix apple, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a ziploc bag.
5. Sprinkle the mixture over sausage (and any juices).
6. Top with cheese.
7. Carefully roll up the dough and filling into a log.
8. Cut into 8 slices and place each slice flat in sections of a muffin tin.
9. Bake at 400°F for 12-15 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly and biscuits are lightly browned.
